name: Quibi
shortDescription: A mobile-first streaming platform that failed to match how users actually consume content.
finalLesson: User behavior matters more than product quality. Premium content doesn't guarantee demand.

name: Juicero
shortDescription: A $400 juicer that offered little value beyond what users could do by hand.
finalLesson: If a simpler solution exists, users will find it. Overengineering destroys perceived value.

name: Theranos
shortDescription: A blood-testing startup that collapsed after its core technology failed to deliver.
finalLesson: You cannot fake core technology. Trust is impossible to rebuild once broken.

name: Pets.com
shortDescription: An online pet supply company that couldn't sustain the cost of shipping low-margin goods.
finalLesson: Revenue does not equal profit. Logistics costs can kill a business.

name: Vine
shortDescription: A short-form video platform that failed to retain creators due to lack of monetization.
finalLesson: Creators follow incentives. Platforms must reward their power users.

name: Google Stadia
shortDescription: A cloud gaming service that struggled to convince users to switch from traditional platforms.
finalLesson: Convenience must outweigh existing habits. New platforms need strong exclusive value.

name: WeWork
shortDescription: A coworking company whose aggressive expansion and financial model proved unsustainable.
finalLesson: Growth without fundamentals is fragile. Narrative cannot replace financial reality.

name: Webvan
shortDescription: An online grocery delivery service that expanded too quickly without proven demand.
finalLesson: Validate before scaling. Infrastructure should follow demand, not lead it.

name: Beepi
shortDescription: A used car marketplace that couldn't sustain its operational and logistics costs.
finalLesson: Margins matter more than growth. Operational complexity scales faster than expected.

name: Color
shortDescription: A heavily funded social app that failed to deliver a clear or compelling user experience.
finalLesson: Funding does not guarantee adoption. Users must instantly understand the product.
